# Third Party Notices

This directory contains Windows MIDI Services components that are subject to the following licenses:

## Windows MIDI Services

**Project:** Windows MIDI Services
**License:** MIT License
**Copyright:** Microsoft Corporation

This project uses the Windows MIDI Services SDK and C++/WinRT projection headers.

### Dependencies

The Windows MIDI Services implementation may depend on the following Windows components:

1. **Windows Runtime (WinRT)**
   - Part of Windows OS
   - Copyright Microsoft Corporation

2. **C++/WinRT**
   - MIT License
   - Copyright Microsoft Corporation
   - https://github.com/microsoft/cppwinrt

For complete license information, see LICENSE.txt in this directory.

## Attribution

Windows MIDI Services is developed by Microsoft Corporation.
For more information, visit: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/uwp/audio-video-camera/midi
